title: linaria × polychroa
intro: Linaria × polychroa, also known as the Toadflax or Canary Bird's Eye, is a hybrid flowering plant in the figwort family, known for its vibrant, long-spurred flowers in shades of yellow and red. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Linaria × polychroa include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions, tinctures, and topical applications, which can be used to create teas, salves, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
